title: Multiplexed Imaging Mass Cytometry of Chemokine Milieus in Metastatic Melanoma - Raw Data
author: Hoch, Tobias
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The following folders/files are part of this repository: 

 
	 Folder " rna ": contains raw data from the RNA & Protein data set 

	 
		 Folder " config ": .csv file with all the information on the antibody and RNAScope panel 
		 Folder " cp_scripts ": contains files for the CellProfiler pipeline used to generate single-cell data 
		 Folder " cpout ": contains results from the CellProfiler pipeline
		 
			 "* _cellmask.tiff ": final cell mask used to generate single-cell data  
			 "*_ full_spillcor.tiff ": full .tiff with all channels after spill-over correction 
			 " cell.csv ": .csv with the channel intensities for all cells 
			 " Experiment.csv ": .csv containing CellProfiler settings used to export single-cell data 
			 " Image.csv ": .csv containing information on all single images 
			 " Object relationships.csv ": .csv containing all cell-cell interactions 
		 
		 
		 Folder " tiffs "
		 
			 " *_full.csv ": .csv showing channel/metal order of the _full.tiff file 
			 " *_full.tiff : .tiff file with all acquired channels 
			 " *_cellmask.tiff ": initial cell mask (is different to final cell mask stored in " cpout" ) 
			 "* _tumorMask ": channel order, probabilities and mask used to define tumor regions 
		 
		 
	 
	 
	 Folder " protein ": contains raw data from the Protein data set
	 
		 same folder/file structure as the " rna " folder 
	 
	 
	 Folder " exhaustion stain" : raw data generated for the validation of the exhaustion phenotype of CXCL13+ CD8+ T cells
	 
		 folders are structured according to the  steinbock  pipeline 
	 
	 
	 Folder " 12plex_validation ": raw data generated for the validation of the new RNAScope 12-plex system for IMC
	 
		 Folder " HeLa ": contains raw data of experiments performed with HeLa cells (influence of antibody incubation, house-keeping gene measurement, etc) 
		 Folder " overexpression ": contains raw data of experiments with PPIB overexpression in A431 cells to quantify unspecific binding of RNAScope probes
